name: Bug report

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. ...
2. ...

If it involves importing a file, please describe the source format
(FIT/TCX/GPX) and, if possible, attach a **non-sensitive / anonymized** sample
(use the `--anonymize` export to scrub location and personal data).

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS / distribution:
- Python version (`python3 --version`):
- Fenix5Sync version / commit:
- Install method (one-line / manual / `pip install -e .`):
- Acquisition mode (`auto`/`mass_storage`/`mtp`/`path`/`folder`/`file`/`zip`):
- Watch / device model (if relevant):

## Logs

Relevant lines from `~/.local/share/fenix5sync/logs/` (scrub anything sensitive).
